composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and enhance the backend code in main.py
- Ensure Flask app correctly locates and renders all required HTML templates in the 'templates' directory.
- Verify and fix routing for Dashboard, Artifact Catalog, Exhibitions, and Exhibition Details pages to prevent template not found errors and improper redirects.
- Implement robust error handling for missing data files or missing exhibition IDs to avoid redirects caused by missing data.
- Confirm that the 'data' directory is properly accessed and contains required data files with example data for exhibitions and other entities.
- Maintain all original business logic including navigation, filtering, searching, CRUD operations, and data management as per the original task requirements.
composition.Programmer 2:
Verify and organize all frontend HTML templates in the 'templates/' directory
- Ensure all seven HTML template files (dashboard.html, artifact_catalog.html, exhibitions.html, exhibition_details.html, visitor_tickets.html, virtual_events.html, audio_guides.html) are present in the 'templates' directory at the root of the project.
- Confirm that all elements have the specified IDs as per the requirements document.
- Ensure all URLs in the frontend code use Flask routes (url_for) and not direct HTML file names.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to confirm that template names and locations match those expected by the backend.
- Fix any missing or misplaced template files that cause Flask to raise TemplateNotFound errors.
